gt-reset-confirm: Reset ALL tracker progress for this game?
page-title: Kingdom Hearts III Re Mind — Achievement Tracker
kh-title: Kingdom Hearts III Re Mind — Achievement Tracker
kh-subtitle: Every trophy, Gummiphone entry, treasure, synthesis item, recipe, photo mission and gummi battle in one checklist, saved in your browser. Checklist data from xenodusk's completion guide.
kp-note: Backs up / restores ALL Kingdom Hearts tracker progress on this site as a JSON file.
kp-import-confirm: Importing will overwrite the saved progress of every KH tool on this site with the file's contents. Continue?
kp-import-error: That file could not be read as a progress export.

trophies.name: A New Journey
trophies.desc: Begin your brand new adventure.

trophies.name: Clash of the Gods
trophies.desc: Adventure through Olympus and complete the story.

trophies.name: A Wish at Twilight
trophies.desc: Adventure through Twilight Town and complete the story.

trophies.name: Inseparable Friends
trophies.desc: Adventure through Toy Box and complete the story.

trophies.name: Happily Ever After
trophies.desc: Adventure through the Kingdom of Corona and complete the story.

trophies.name: The Power of Laughter
trophies.desc: Adventure through Monstropolis and complete the story.

trophies.name: An Act of True Love
trophies.desc: Adventure through Arendelle and complete the story.

trophies.name: Way of the Pirate
trophies.desc: Adventure through The Caribbean and complete the story.

trophies.name: Making a Difference
trophies.desc: Adventure through San Fransokyo and complete the story.

trophies.name: Home Again
trophies.desc: Adventure through the Hundred Acre Wood and complete the story.

trophies.name: The Hearts Joined to His
trophies.desc: Gather the seven guardians of light.

trophies.name: No Matter What
trophies.desc: Reunite with Kairi.

trophies.name: The Battle to End All
trophies.desc: Begin the final confrontation with Master Xehanort.

trophies.name: Another Chapter Closed
trophies.desc: Finish the game and view the ending.

trophies.name: Hidden Kings
trophies.desc: Complete the Lucky Emblems section of the Gummiphone.

trophies.name: Know Thine Enemy
trophies.desc: Complete the Adversaries section of the Gummiphone.

trophies.name: No Stone Unturned
trophies.desc: Complete the Treasures section of the Gummiphone.

trophies.name: Synthesist
trophies.desc: Complete the Synthesis section of the Gummiphone.

trophies.name: One for the Books
trophies.desc: Complete the Game Records section of the Gummiphone.

trophies.name: Tall Enough to Ride
trophies.desc: Use an attraction to defeat enemies for the first time.

trophies.name: Heartbound
trophies.desc: Use a link to defeat enemies for the first time.

trophies.name: Grand Mage
trophies.desc: Cast grand magic for the first time.

trophies.name: Knight
trophies.desc: Defeat 1,000 enemies.

trophies.name: Bishop
trophies.desc: Defeat 3,000 enemies.

trophies.name: Rook
trophies.desc: Defeat 5,000 enemies.

trophies.name: Flanmeister
trophies.desc: Complete all of the Flantastic Seven missions.

trophies.name: Salvager
trophies.desc: Use the gummi ship to obtain 20 unique treasures.

trophies.name: Stargazer
trophies.desc: Use the gummi ship to find and photograph all the constellations.

trophies.name: Thermosphere
trophies.desc: Destroy the Schwarzgeist, menace of the Ocean Between.

trophies.name: Centurion
trophies.desc: Score at least 12,000,000 pts. in Verum Rex: Beat of Lead.

trophies.name: Festive Dancer
trophies.desc: Score at least 70,000 pts. in the Festival Dance.

trophies.name: Shield Shredder
trophies.desc: Score at least 600,000 pts. in Frozen Slider.

trophies.name: Datascraper
trophies.desc: Get an A rank on both Flash Tracer courses.

trophies.name: Dreadnought
trophies.desc: Fully power up the Leviathan.

trophies.name: True Captain
trophies.desc: Sink 200 enemy ships in The Caribbean.

trophies.name: Say Cheese!
trophies.desc: Snap your first photo.

trophies.name: Lasting Memories
trophies.desc: Hold on to 50 photos.

trophies.name: Cornucopia
trophies.desc: Collect every type of ingredient.

trophies.name: Full Course
trophies.desc: Earn your first "Excellent" while preparing cuisine.

trophies.name: Master Chef
trophies.desc: Earn an "Excellent" while preparing every type of cuisine.

trophies.name: Muscle Memory
trophies.desc: Get a new high score in one of the Classic Kingdom games.

trophies.name: Classically Trained
trophies.desc: Get a new high score in every Classic Kingdom game.

trophies.name: Blademaster
trophies.desc: Obtain a Keyblade that is fully powered up.

trophies.name: Ultima Weapon
trophies.desc: Synthesize the Ultima Weapon.

trophies.name: Leveled Out
trophies.desc: Raise Sora to LV 99.

trophies.name: All-rounder
trophies.desc: Earn all EZ Code merits.

trophies.name: Risk-taker
trophies.desc: Reach the highest PRO Code merit rank.

trophies.name: Behind the Curtain
trophies.desc: Clear KINGDOM HEARTS III Re Mind.

trophies.name: Start Analysis
trophies.desc: Eliminate One Darkness in the datascape.

trophies.name: Analysis Complete
trophies.desc: Eliminate Thirteen Darknesses in the datascape.

trophies.name: Beyond the Curtain
trophies.desc: Defeat Yozora.
